TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kingdalruwane, title = Kingdalruwane, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kingdalruwane} }

S.FORM: alang Kingdalruwane ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 17 buwan, 62 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 61 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 66%, Paywan 21%, binah lihuyan s'uli 11%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kingdalruwane hya' ga Tjukuvulj. tay 'zil na Kingdalruwane hya' ga Sagaran. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kingdalruwane ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 17 buwan, 62 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 61 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 66%, Paywan 21%, binah lihuyan s'uli 11%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kingdalruwane hya' ga Tjukuvulj. tay 'zil na Kingdalruwane hya' ga Sagaran. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kiŋ*alruwane ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu s~ɕantimon ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, rukaj **%, pajwan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kiŋ*alruwane ħjaʔ ɣa tjuku*ulj. taj ʔzil na kiŋ*alruwane ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕaɣaran. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
